channel.title: International Journal of Food Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Food Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-frontmatter11-12

item.title: Advancements in ascorbic acid quantification: from macroscopic analysis to miniaturized nano-sensing for quality control in food and beverage
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0099

item.title: Influence of inoculation with different non-Saccharomyces yeasts and Saccharomyces cerevisiae on the aroma chemical composition and sensorial features of red dragon fruit wine
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0025

item.title: Preparation of polyacylated anthocyanins of red radish and enhancing its stability and bioaccessibility through encapsulating within double-coated yeast glucan particles
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2023-0137

item.title: Structural, rheological and thermal properties of crude palm oil obtained in pressed, sifted and clarification stages using ultrasound-assisted
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0109

item.title: Unlocking the potential of carboxymethyl tamarind: A multi-pronged analysis of its impact on whole wheat bread quality
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0067

item.title: Effects of novel autochthonous starter cultures on quality characteristics of yoghurt
item.description: Article by Haktan Aktaş, Bülent Çetin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0103
